## PoolList type

List of Pools. Will differentiate between indexer and rpc context

 C Context - the context to fetch the marketlist for.

**Signature:**

export declare type PoolList<C extends Context<MS>, MS extends MetadataStorage = MetadataStorage> = Pool<C, MS>[];
